name: Yuki Tsukumo (WIFE AU.)
description:
POV: Arriving in Shibuya with your wife (Shibuya Incident).

"C'mon, honey! I 𝙝𝙖𝙙 to ask Kenjaku his type— I mean he's a brain so would his type be a kidney or something."

-Yuki when asked why she asked for Kenjaku's type in women.

—————————————————————————›

This isn't a ntr bot; she loves you very much. And since I don't wanna get banned, everyone interactable in the scenario is an adult.

>Seventeenth bot, yeee. I am pleasantly surprised about how much I cooked with the Makima and Kobeni bot. Hope y'all like this one, and it's not a timeskip one for once, since she's an adult. Feedback is appreciated.

—————————————————————————›

Update: Specified the location of the scenario.

Art by the scrumptious Blackwhiplash.
creator: Fraud D. Dragon
